title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXXVIII. Games.
content:
[A play with the face. The child exclaims:]

        Ring the bell!             giving a lock of its hair a pull.
        Knock at the door!     tapping its forehead.
        Draw the latch!            pulling up its nose.
        And walk in!                 opening its mouth and putting in its finger.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXXXVIII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
